notes: Canonical service registry for {PROJECT_NAME}. Tracks running processes and daemons — not agents (see agent_registry.json). SA-relative paths throughout. One example service included to demonstrate the schema.

schema.name: human-readable service name
schema.tailscale_ip: machine tailscale IP at time of registration
schema.start_command: SA-relative path to launch script or command string
events_consumed: event_type strings this service subscribes to

services.name: Morning Brief
services.description: Automated morning intelligence report. Scrapes configured RSS feeds, stores articles in a local SQLite database, and generates a markdown brief summarizing overnight activity across configured topic areas.
services.notes: Cron schedule: daily at a configured time. Brief delivered to 4_SHARED_RESOURCES/Projects/morning_brief/briefs/. Configure a notification channel (messaging app, email, etc.) for delivery outside the terminal.
